positive: A minimalist and stylized depiction of a soaring golden hawk, rendered in bold, clean silhouette against a vibrant gradient sky of deep cerulean blue and ethereal lavender. The hawk should be captured mid-flight, wings outstretched in a powerful, graceful arc, embodying freedom and strength. Focus on strong negative space and high contrast. Geometric, abstract elements (like wind currents or mountain peaks) should subtly frame the central subject, giving it an emblem-like feel. Flat vector art aesthetic mixed with intricate line work, suitable for screen printing. Style: Modern illustrative art, pop-art influence. Lighting: Crisp, high-contrast directional light. Color palette: Gold, deep blue, lavender, and white.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, writing, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noisy, low detail, bokeh, realistic photograph, grainy, clutter, gradient edges, multiple subjects
